Stylist.title: Welcome Stylists!

Stylist.name: Name
Stylist.thanks: Thanks — we'll be in touch shortly.

hero.tagline: Live every day boldly and show off your true colors
hero.description: An Nhiên crafts premium hair extensions and wigs that stylists and retailers around the world can rely on — strand by strand, salon by salon.

philosophy.title: Made to last
philosophy.body: We hand-select Remy hair, machine-weft with care, and process gently so every bundle keeps its softness, bounce, and longevity. A great product shouldn't just look good on day one — it should hold up after repeated coloring, bleaching, and styling.

approach.title: Clean sourcing, transparent process
approach.body: From our workshop in Bắc Ninh to your salon, every bundle is sorted by length, inspected for cuticle alignment, and neutralized to spec. Stylists deserve to work with materials they can verify — no surprises, no blends.

statement.title: Vietnamese craft, global standard
statement.body: An Nhiên is proudly made in Vietnam, pairing skilled hands with international quality control to serve salons, stylists, and retailers in more than 20 countries.

items.title: Natural softness
items.body: Cuticle-aligned, tangle-free, and indistinguishable from natural hair to the touch.

items.title: Built to hold
items.body: Keeps its shape after repeated coloring, bleaching, and heat styling with proper care.

items.title: For every look
items.body: Bulk, weft, tape-in, and full-lace wigs — we cover the full range of professional needs.

cta.title: Look great — feel even better
cta.body: Explore the latest collection and pick the right pieces for your salon, brand, or personal styling kit.

items.title: Quality guarantee
items.body: 7-day returns if the product doesn't match the description.

items.title: Online support
items.body: Stylist-to-stylist help via Zalo and email, 7 days a week.

items.title: Flexible payment
items.body: Bank transfer, COD, and international gateways.

contact.title: Ready to partner with us?
contact.body: Call or message the An Nhiên team to receive wholesale pricing, sample bundles, and collection advice tailored to your market.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.intro: We love hearing from stylists, shop owners, and customers. Reach us through any of the channels below.

q1.a: Yes. All our products are 100% human Remy hair from a single donor.

q2.q: Can I dye or bleach these extensions?
q2.a: Yes — we recommend having a professional stylist handle color work.

q3.a: Yes, we ship worldwide via DHL, FedEx, and EMS.

q4.a: Unopened products may be returned within 14 days of delivery.
